nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.notes:
⚙️ После импорта: создать credential типа 'Telegram API' в n8n UI,
вставить Bot Token из TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, привязать к этому ноду.
Webhook URL регистрируется автоматически при активации флоу.

nodes.name: IF: /digest command
nodes.notes:
TRUE -> process /digest
FALSE -> ignore (bot gets all messages in group if privacy mode off)

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE((ev.parsed_json->>'relevance_score')::int, 0) AS relevance_score,
  c.name        AS company,
  j.job_title,
  j.location,
  j.work_mode::text AS work_mode,
  j.summary,
  j.source_url
FROM jobs j
JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = j.company_id
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT parsed_json FROM job_events
  WHERE job_id = j.id
  ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
) ev ON TRUE
WHERE (j.seniority IS NULL OR j.seniority::text NOT IN ('senior','lead','principal','staff','head','executive'))
  AND j.job_type = 'employment'
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, j.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

nodes.name: DB: Fetch Top Jobs
nodes.notes:
Top 20 employment jobs by relevance (no senior filter).
job_type = 'employment' excludes Gewerbe/freelance entries.

nodes.name: Format Digest
nodes.notes:
Groups top 20 jobs into 3 tiers.
chat_id taken from the incoming Telegram message — reply goes to same chat.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: $json.text, disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

nodes.name: Telegram: Send Digest
nodes.notes:
Sends reply to the same chat the /digest command came from.
Works in private chat, group, or channel.
